title: Composer Repository Package Loading
interaction_flow: PoolBuilder → PoolBuilder: loop while packagesToLoad > 0 → loadPackagesMarkedForLoading(request, repositories)
PoolBuilder → ComposerRepository: loadPackages(packageNameMap, acceptableStabilities, stabilityFlags, alreadyLoaded)
ComposerRepository → HttpDownloader: get(url, {If-Modified-Since: lastModifiedTime}) → 304 or new data
ComposerRepository → ComposerRepository: parse rootData → set lazyProvidersUrl (metadata-url), availablePackages, hasAvailablePackageList
ComposerRepository → ComposerRepository: loadAsyncPackages(packageNameMap, acceptableStabilities, stabilityFlags, alreadyLoaded)
ComposerRepository → HttpDownloader: addCopy/async GET(metadataUrl, options) → Promise<Response>
ComposerRepository → Loop: wait(promises) [resolve all async downloads]
ComposerRepository → ComposerRepository: isVersionAcceptable(constraint, name, versionData, stabilities)
PoolBuilder → PoolBuilder: markPackageNameForLoading for each new dependency found
ComposerRepository → ComposerRepository: loadPackages() → hasProviders=true → calls whatProvides(name,...)
ComposerRepository → HttpDownloader: get(url, options) [up to 3 retries]
key_relationships: ComposerRepository depends_on ArrayLoader (createPackages from raw data)
ComposerRepository extends ArrayRepository (fallback loadPackages for static repos)

protocol_variants.v2_metadata_url: Uses lazyProvidersUrl (metadata-url), async HTTP, MetadataMinifier::expand(), supports available-packages list for filtering, per-package JSON at p2/{vendor}/{pkg}.json
protocol_variants.v1_providers_url: Uses providersUrl with sha256 hash in URL, synchronous fetchFile(), provider listing must be loaded first
protocol_variants.v1_lazy_providers: Uses providers-lazy-url, last-modified conditional fetch, fetchFileIfLastModified()
protocol_variants.static_packages_json: No providers/lazyUrl, falls through to parent ArrayRepository::loadPackages()

caching_strategy.root_file: packages.json in cache-repo-dir, conditional fetch via If-Modified-Since
caching_strategy.provider_files: provider-{vendor}~{pkg}.json (V2) or provider-{vendor}${pkg}.json (V1), keyed by sha256 (V1) or last-modified (V2)
caching_strategy.degraded_mode: on HTTP error, falls back to stale cache with warning

important_notes: ComposerRepository supports both V1 (providers-url + sha256) and V2 (metadata-url + async + minified) protocols. V2 is preferred for Packagist. The loadAsyncPackages method fires all HTTP requests as React promises and resolves them via Loop::wait(). PoolBuilder calls loadPackages iteratively in batches (LOAD_BATCH_SIZE=50) until the dependency graph is fully resolved. EventDispatcher hooks allow plugins to intercept/modify download URLs and options (PRE_FILE_DOWNLOAD / POST_FILE_DOWNLOAD).
